content.rendered:
Website Management Services: Improve Ranking, Speed and Security

Websites require proper maintenance to remain relevant in an ever changing digital landscape. Whether you need to stay current on all program updates, improve your content, or protect your website from online attacks, Nowspeed has the skills and tools to keep your website running smoothly 24/7.

LET’S TALK

Routine updates for optimal website performance.

Nowspeed ensures website updates improve the performance of your website. Websites need proper checkups and maintenance in order to run efficiently. We closely monitor for updates to browsers, themes, and plugins to maintain a consistent website experience for all users.

Our website management services include monthly website check-ups for WordPress, PHP, theme and plugins. We review the entire website and test all features to ensure everything functions properly. We monitor your site in real-time, and respond immediately if an outage occurs. If there happens to be a problem with the website, we are notified the moment something goes wrong and resolve the issue as quickly as possible.

Keep your site up-to-date with regular copy edits and unique features.

If your existing website doesn’t rank well, breaks often, and/or is poorly designed, the marketing team at Nowspeed can help. We audit your website, including site analytics, prior to making any major changes-our goal is to keep the pages that rank well, and improve the pages that don’t. For new and existing clients, we run monthly analytical reports to measure the effectiveness of any site updates. Based on the data, we continuously make tweaks and adjustments to increase the website’s performance.

Protect your website, personal data, and customers from cyber attacks.

Nowspeed utilizes several security and antispam services, such as best-in-class DNS hosting, CDNs, and website plugins to prevent your website from being compromised by DDOS attacks, data breaches, malicious bot abuse, and spam. In addition, our security providers send notifications and alerts to our development team in the event of an attempted breach, or other suspicious activity, to quickly rectify the issue.

See Our Pricing

We strive to deliver first-rate website management services and we’d be happy to provide a quote for a website once we understand your goals and the scope of the project.

GET A QUOTE

Have Questions About Our Website Management Services?

We want to make sure you’re as informed as possible so you can make a great decision on what marketing company is best for you. Below is our FAQ about our process, details and more.

How can you improve and expand upon my existing website?

Based on evaluation of your website, we can often add graphics, content, pages, events calendars, interactive maps, submission forms, and other unique features.
In terms of search ranking and visibility, we are extremely well versed in fixing technical issues which undermine SEO, as well as developing content that performs well with both customers and search crawlers. We have a team of content writers in-house who can review your existing website for grammatical and spelling errors, improve copy, and generate compelling and relevant content in the form of blogs, landing pages, and more.

Can you work with my in-house marketing team or third-party vendor?

Yes, many businesses we work with have a marketing member on staff and we often coordinate our work with an in-house marketing team.

How much does website management cost?

Website management is included in our monthly website retainer. We also offer an hourly rate if your website only edits and updates throughout the year.

Does website management include hosting and backups?

Yes, our website management services include hosting and backups. Before we perform any work on the website we require your website to be on Nowspeed servers to ensure maximum performance and protection, and to save backup versions of your website.

Can you update my existing website?

If your website was built in WordPress, then we can perform updates. If your website was built using another service, then we may be able to assist with minor changes, or leverage one of our development partners to help you get the job done.

So let’s
talk.

We’re always excited to dig into the details of your company and what strategy can help you meet your goals. So let’s talk and lay out a plan for success!

CONTACT US
